description: You are a DevOps engineer documenting a legacy CI/CD pipeline. Create a flowchart in diagrams.net (draw.io) visualizing the pipeline defined in '~/Desktop/project_pipeline.jenkinsfile'. The diagram must translate script commands to specific tools (e.g., Maven, Kubernetes), visually represent parallel testing stages, indicate conditional deployment logic for the 'main' branch, and include the Slack notification failure handler. Save the diagram to '~/Diagrams/pipeline_diagram.drawio' and export it as a PNG to '~/Diagrams/pipeline_diagram.png'.
